prompt: make a webiste for the school
html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Generated Website</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --primary: #635bff;
            --secondary: #ff5f56;
            --accent: #546de5;
            --background: #f5f5f5;
            --surface: #ffffff;
            --text: #333333;
            --radius: 12px;
            --shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }

        body {
            margin: 0;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            color: var(--text);
            background-color: var(--background);
        }

       .container {
            max-width: 1200px;
            margin: 0 auto;
            padding: 0 20px;
        }

        .navbar {
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            background: var(--surface);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
            z-index: 1000;
        }

       .navbar .logo {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--primary);
        }

        .navbar.links {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
            align-items: center;
        }

       .navbar.links a {
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text);
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: color 0.3s;
        }

       .navbar .links a:hover {
            color: var(--primary);
        }

       .navbar.cta {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--surface);
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
        }

        .navbar.cta:hover {
            background: var(--accent);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }

        .hero {
            padding: 100px 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            color: var(--surface);
            text-align: center;
            border-radius: 0 0 20px 20px;
        }

       .hero h1 {
            font-size: 3rem;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

       .hero p {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }

       .hero .ctas {
            display: flex;
            gap: 20px;
        }

       .hero .ctas a {
            padding: 15px 30px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
            transition: background 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
        }

       .hero.ctas.primary {
            background: var(--surface);
            color: var(--primary);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }

       .hero.ctas .secondary {
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--surface);
            border: 2px solid var(--surface);
        }

       .hero.ctas .primary:hover {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--surface);
        }

        .hero.ctas.secondary:hover {
            color: var(--primary);
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }

        .features {
            padding: 80px 20px;
            background: var(--surface);
        }

       .features.card {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 20px;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }

        .features .card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
        }

       .features.card .icon {
            font-size: 2rem;
            color: var(--primary);
        }

        .benefits {
            padding: 80px 20px;
            background: var(--background);
        }

       .benefits.card {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }

       .benefits .card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
        }

       .benefits.card h3 {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

       .statistics {
            padding: 80px 20px;
            background: var(--surface);
            color: var(--text);
            text-align: center;
        }

       .statistics.card {
            display: inline-block;
            margin: 0 20px;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
        }

       .statistics .card h3 {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 2rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

       .testimonials {
            padding: 80px 20px;
            background: var(--background);
        }

       .testimonials .card {
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

       .testimonials .card p {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

       .testimonials .card .author {
            font-weight: 600;
        }

       .pricing {
            padding: 80px 20px;
            background: var(--surface);
        }

       .pricing.tier {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow);
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .pricing.tier.recommended {
            border: 2px solid var(--primary);
        }

       .pricing.tier h3 {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

       .pricing.tier.price {
            font-size: 2rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

       .faq {
            padding: 80px 20px;
            background: var(--background);
        }

       .faq.item {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

       .faq.item.question {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

       .faq.item.answer {
            margin-left: 20px;
        }

        .contact {
            padding: 80px 20px;
            background: var(--surface);
        }

       .contact form {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 20px;
        }

        .contact form input,
       .contact form textarea {
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            border: 1px solid var(--text);
        }

       .contact form button {
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: var(--radius);
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--surface);
            border: none;
            font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.3s;
        }

       .contact form button:hover {
            background: var(--accent);
        }

       .footer {
            padding: 40px 20px;
            background: var(--primary);
            color: var(--surface);
        }

       .footer .column {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
        }

        .footer.column h4 {
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

       .footer .column a {
            color: var(--surface);
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: color 0.3s;
        }

       .footer.column a:hover {
            color
